content.rendered: Srivatsan is responsible for managing AMI’s strategic partnerships worldwide. With over 25 years of experience, he drives and structures complex business deals with strategic partners and has a proven track record in creating successful partnerships through extensive alliance management expertise. Srivatsan holds a Bachelor’s degree in Business from the University of Madras and an MBA from Radford University in Virginia, USA.
